diagrams.title: Interface Method Hierarchy in Java 9+
diagrams.description: Shows the types of methods allowed in Java interfaces from versions 7-9
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the evolution and capabilities of interface methods

diagrams.title: Code Duplication Problem and Solution
diagrams.description: Before and after using private interface methods
elements: Before: Two default methods with identical code blocks marked in red
After: Common code moved to private method, default methods call it
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the problem that private methods solve

diagrams.title: Access Scope of Interface Methods
diagrams.description: Shows visibility levels from most visible to least visible
